/usr/bin/c++ -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/dsk_SFC.dir/newmat10/bandmat.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dsk_SFC.dir/newmat10/cholesky.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dsk_SFC.dir/newmat10/evalue.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dsk_SFC.dir/newmat10/fft.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dsk_SFC.dir/newmat10/hholder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dsk_SFC.dir/newmat10/jacobi.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dsk_SFC.dir/newmat10/myexcept.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dsk_SFC.dir/newmat10/newfft.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dsk_SFC.dir/newmat10/newmat1.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dsk_SFC.dir/newmat10/newmat2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dsk_SFC.dir/newmat10/newmat3.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dsk_SFC.dir/newmat10/newmat4.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dsk_SFC.dir/newmat10/newmat5.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dsk_SFC.dir/newmat10/newmat6.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dsk_SFC.dir/newmat10/newmat7.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dsk_SFC.dir/newmat10/newmat8.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dsk_SFC.dir/newmat10/newmat9.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dsk_SFC.dir/newmat10/newmatex.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dsk_SFC.dir/newmat10/newmatnl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dsk_SFC.dir/newmat10/newmatrm.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dsk_SFC.dir/newmat10/solution.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dsk_SFC.dir/newmat10/sort.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dsk_SFC.dir/newmat10/submat.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dsk_SFC.dir/newmat10/svd.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dsk_SFC.dir/auxiliary/betadev.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dsk_SFC.dir/auxiliary/bnldev.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dsk_SFC.dir/auxiliary/gammln.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dsk_SFC.dir/auxiliary/gasdev.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dsk_SFC.dir/auxiliary/ran1.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dsk_SFC.dir/modules/module_energy_sfc.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dsk_SFC.dir/modules/module_climate_sfc.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dsk_SFC.dir/modules/module_macro_sfc.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dsk_SFC.dir/modules/module_finance_sfc.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dsk_SFC.dir/dsk_sfc_main.cpp.o -o dsk_SFC
